title: schefflera cuneifolia
intro: Schefflera cuneifolia, also known as the Nepali Schefflera, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Araliaceae. Traditionally, Schefflera cuneifolia has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Schefflera cuneifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
